title: marar #4843
definition:
1) to be bitter
    1a) (Qal) to be bitter
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to show bitterness
        1b2) to make bitter
    1c) (Hiphil) to make bitter, embitter
    1d) (Hithpalpel)
        1d1) to embitter oneself
        1d2) to be enraged
 2) (TWOT) to be strong, strengthen
